product.name: ArDura 1000 Fr
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkaniny PA 6.6 — warianty powlekane, FR i wzmocnione
product.familyDescriptorEn: PA 6.6 fabrics — coated, FR and reinforced variants
product.categorySourceGroup: Woven PA.6.6 fabrics for police uniforms, motorcyclists, bomb disposal suits and technical military applications.
product.titleDescriptor: Pa6.6 woven flame retardant coated fabric for Police and Gendarme wear
product.specLine: 350 g/m², 95% Pa 6.6 5%Pu, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Waterproof, Flame Retardant Woven Fabric
descriptions: ArDura 1000 Fr is heavyweight 95% polyamide 5% Polyurethane 6.6 woven fabric for military, police and gendarme wear. It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear.
The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for polices.
The fabric has water and oil repellent function.
It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability.
The antibacterial function is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work.
The fabric has flame retardant coating on back side which gives flame retardant and waterproof function at the same time.
Pa6.6 woven flame retardant coated fabric for Police and Gendarme wear
350 g/m², 95% Pa 6.6 5%Pu, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Waterproof, Flame Retardant Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>3000N; Weft>2500N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>250N; Weft>200N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants | EN ISO 14362-1
Allergenic Dyestuffs | Not Detected | EN ISO 14362-1
applicationImageLabels: Cordura Reinforced Pbo 4 layer firefighter suit

evidence: Woven PA.6.6 fabrics for police uniforms, motorcyclists, bomb disposal suits and technical military applications.
ArDura 1000 Fr is heavyweight 95% polyamide 5% Polyurethane 6.6 woven fabric for military, police and gendarme wear.
Pa6.6 woven flame retardant coated fabric for Police and Gendarme wear
acceptedMatches.rationale: Product explicitly describes use for military, police and gendarme wear, directly matching the military/uniformed services application.

evidence: It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear.
acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicit statement that the fabric is suitable for motorcyclist police wear and technical parameter explicitly lists 'Police Motobikers' as an application.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Application image label shows a firefighter suit example, but the product's own descriptions and specLine focus on police/military use, not explicit firefighting garment intent; FR property alone is insufficient per rules.

evidence: Woven PA.6.6 fabrics for police uniforms, motorcyclists, bomb disposal suits and technical military applications.
ArDura 1000 Fr is heavyweight 95% polyamide 5% Polyurethane 6.6 woven fabric for military, police and gendarme wear.
Pa6.6 woven flame retardant coated fabric for Police and Gendarme wear
primary.rationale: The product is explicitly and repeatedly described as intended for military, police and gendarme wear, which is the dominant and most direct stated end use.

evidence: It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear.
secondary.rationale: The technical parameters explicitly list 'Police Motobikers' as an application and the description states suitability for mobile motorcyclist police wear, an independently supported secondary use.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Only an application image label shows a firefighter suit example; no explicit text ties this fabric to firefighting garments, so FR property alone is insufficient per rules.
Narrower named sectors (military, motorcycle) are explicitly stated, making generic workwear classification unnecessary.
